subject: LU-14016 libcfs: use atomic64_t for libcfs_kmem

values.-1: I would prefer that you didn't submit this
values.+1: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

(17 comments)

I think this could be improved to be a lot cleaner and better encapsulated, in particular to use libcfs_kmem_read() everywhere to avoid typecasting everywhere, and to simplify changing the implementation in the future, as described in LU-14016.

parents.subject: LU-13498 tests: remove tests from ALWAYS_EXCEPT with SSK

commit.subject: LU-14016 libcfs: use atomic64_t for libcfs_kmem
commit.message:
LU-14016 libcfs: use atomic64_t for libcfs_kmem

libcfs_kmem keeps track of LNet's memory usage. It uses an
int type, so it could wrap around if usage grows beyond 2.14 GB.
Use atomic64_t to avoid this issue.

Signed-off-by: Amir Shehata <ashehata@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: If96fb8391c6ffb1924e47cef3dfca02eabc5f912
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/40168
